stemHtml: What is the definition and purpose of V<sub>C</sub>?

options.a: The "Design Cruise Speed", used to show compliance with gust intensity loading.
options.b: The "Design Dive Speed",  the highest speed planned to be achieved in testing.
options.c: The "Design Speed for Maximum Gust Intensity", used to show compliance with gust intensity loading.
options.d: Maximum landing gear extended speed, to prevent damage to aircraft with retractable undercarriage.
